narrative:
Monroe County has 8,651 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.0%, a clear Democratic lean of 10.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 33.5% of registrants.
